_meta.notes: imageUrl populated for every 2026 shoe via the image-search skill (manufacturer/retailer/review CDN URLs). To re-run for newly added shoes, see scripts/backfill-shoe-images.ts.

shoes.description: Brooks' iconic neutral daily trainer, refreshed in 2026 with a smoother DNA Loft v3 midsole and lighter mesh upper for everyday miles.
Premium max-cushioned long-run shoe with nitrogen-infused DNA Tuned foam, offering plush comfort for high-mileage neutral runners.
Stability-focused version of the Glycerin 23 with GuideRails support, ideal for mild over-pronators wanting plush long-run cushioning.
Reliable stability daily trainer with GuideRails holistic support, the go-to pick for runners needing dependable mileage with mild pronation control.
Brooks' flagship marathon racer with full-length carbon plate and SpeedVault Race+ PEBA midsole for explosive race-day performance.
Plateless speed trainer with DNA Flash v2 nitrogen-infused foam, designed as a high-mileage tempo and uptempo workout shoe.
Top-tier marathon super-shoe with PWRRUN HG PEBA midsole and a forked carbon plate, built for elite-level race performances over 5K to marathon.
Saucony's flagship max-cushion daily trainer with PWRRUN PB midsole, offering plush comfort and a smooth ride for long runs and recovery miles.
Versatile neutral daily trainer with PWRRUN+ midsole, the workhorse of Saucony's lineup for everyday training across paces.
Lightweight, low-drop neutral trainer ideal for tempo runs, intervals, and runners who want a fast, ground-feel shoe at an affordable price.
Nylon-plated PWRRUN PB super-trainer that doubles as a budget marathon racer, beloved for its lively, propulsive ride.
Aggressive 5mm-lug trail shoe with PWRTRAC outsole and rock plate, built for technical singletrack and varied off-road terrain.
HOKA's most popular max-cushioned daily trainer, refreshed for 2026 with a refined supercritical EVA midsole and engineered jacquard upper.
HOKA's max-stack long-distance cushioning king, ideal for big runners, recovery days, and ultra-comfortable long mileage.
Lightweight supercritical-foam tempo shoe that doubles as a daily trainer for fast runners, with a snappy, propulsive ride.
Plush nitrogen-infused EVA long-run shoe positioned between the Clifton and Bondi, with a smooth, balanced ride.
HOKA's iconic do-everything trail shoe with Vibram Megagrip outsole and 5mm lugs, refreshed in 2026 with an updated supercritical midsole.
HOKA's premier carbon-plated racer with PEBA-infused midsole and Vaporfly-rivalling efficiency for marathon and shorter race distances.
Plated PEBA super-trainer with a Pebax energy plate, marketed as a daily-driver alternative to traditional carbon racers.
Premium max-cushioned long-run trainer with FF Blast Plus Eco midsole and PureGel heel insert, the gold-standard for plush mileage.
ASICS' bouncy versatile daily trainer with FF Blast Max foam, capable of handling everything from easy runs to fast tempos.
Cult-favorite plateless super-trainer with dual-density FF Turbo + FF Blast Plus midsole, fast enough for racing yet comfortable for daily long runs.
Affordable carbon-plated tempo and race shoe with FF Blast Turbo midsole, a high-value alternative to flagship super-shoes.
Premier stability daily trainer with 4D Guidance System and FF Blast Plus Eco foam, ideal for over-pronators logging high mileage.
ASICS' top-tier marathon racer for stride-runners, with FF Turbo Plus PEBA foam and a full-length carbon plate built for elite race performances.
ASICS' cadence-runner racing super-shoe with FF Turbo Plus and a stiffer plate geometry, optimized for higher turnover styles.
Latest generation of Nike's iconic carbon-plated marathon racer with refined ZoomX foam and a Flyknit upper, built for 5K to marathon PRs.
Top-tier marathon super-shoe with twin Air Zoom pods, ZoomX midsole, and full-length carbon plate, worn by elite athletes for major-marathon victories.
Nike's plush max-cushion daily trainer with ZoomX over ReactX dual-foam stack, the soft long-run workhorse of the Nike lineup.
Nike's iconic do-it-all daily trainer with ReactX foam and dual Zoom Air units, the mileage workhorse of the Pegasus dynasty.
Premium Pegasus variant with sculpted Zoom Air, ZoomX, and ReactX triple-foam stack, designed as a do-everything uptempo trainer.
Trail-ready Pegasus with rugged outsole, gusseted tongue, and weather-resistant upper for mixed-surface runs and light technical trails.
Nike's mainstay stability daily trainer with arch-support sidewalls and Cushlon 3.0 midsole, built for mild over-pronators logging consistent miles.
Nike's plateless short-distance racing flat with ZoomX midsole, optimized for 5K and 10K race-day speed.
Nike's premier max-cushioned trail shoe with ZoomX midsole and Vibram Megagrip outsole, built for ultras and rugged singletrack.
New Balance's flagship neutral max-cushioned trainer with Fresh Foam X midsole, balancing plush comfort and a smooth, responsive ride.
New Balance's flagship marathon super-shoe with PEBA-based FuelCell midsole and full-length carbon plate, built for elite race-day performance.
Maximally-cushioned plated super-trainer for high-mileage marathon prep, with PEBA midsole and full-length carbon Energy Arc plate.
Maximum-stack neutral cushioning shoe with low-drop platform and PEBA-blend Fresh Foam X, ideal for ultra-comfortable long runs.
Lightweight plateless tempo trainer with PEBA-based FuelCell foam, the everyday speed shoe for runners chasing turnover.
On's neutral daily trainer with CloudTec Phase midsole, offering a smooth heel-to-toe transition and signature On ride feel.
On's revolutionary LightSpray-construction marathon super-shoe — the upper is robotically sprayed in 3 minutes — combined with carbon Speedboard for the ultimate race-day weapon.
On's max-cushioned long-run shoe with oversized CloudTec elements and Helion superfoam, built for big mileage and recovery days.
Adidas' ultra-lightweight super-shoe with Lightstrike Pro midsole and Energyrods 3.0 carbon plate — the marathon record-setter at just 3.4oz, designed for one-or-two race uses.
Adidas' flagship marathon super-shoe with Lightstrike Pro and Energyrods 2.0, providing race-ready snap with more durability than the Evo.
Lightweight short-distance racing shoe with Lightstrike Pro and carbon Energyrods, optimized for 5K to half-marathon racing.
Adidas' versatile workout-day trainer with Lightstrike Pro forefoot and glass-fiber Energyrods, the long-time tempo and marathon-prep favorite.
Mizuno's premium max-cushioned long-run shoe with ENERZY NXT foam and Wave Plate technology for a smooth, plush ride.
Lightweight tempo and interval trainer with ENERZY foam and Smooth Speed Assist geometry, designed for fast workouts.
Mizuno's flagship marathon super-shoe with ENERZY NXT foam and full-length carbon plate, refined for elite-level race performances.
Puma's premium plated daily trainer with NITROFOAM Pro and PWRPLATE carbon, offering super-shoe feel at a more accessible price point.
Puma's flagship marathon super-shoe with split-midsole geometry, NITROFOAM Pro, and a full-length PWRPLATE carbon plate.
Zero-drop neutral trainer with anatomical wide toe box and balanced cushioning, ideal for natural-form runners and zero-drop converts.
Premium max-cushion long-run shoe with PEBA-blend foam and roomy toe box, Topo's plush flagship for marathon training.
Altra's flagship zero-drop daily trainer with EGO MAX midsole and FootShape toe box, designed for natural foot positioning across all paces.
Lightweight zero-drop tempo trainer with knit upper and EGO midsole, the go-to fast-feeling Altra for shorter, quicker runs.
Iconic zero-drop trail shoe with MaxTrac outsole and StoneGuard rock plate, the long-time darling of thru-hikers and ultra-trail runners.
Maximum-stack zero-drop trail shoe with Vibram Megagrip outsole, built for ultra-distance trail and rugged backpacking.
Salomon's max-cushioned door-to-trail shoe with Energy Foam midsole, suitable for road approaches plus mellow off-road terrain.
Salomon's road-running daily trainer with Energy Foam and Energy Blade plate, offering plush comfort for everyday road miles.
Salomon's road-racing super-shoe with Energy Foam HD and full-length carbon plate, built for marathon and shorter race distances.
